name: PR Review
description: Transcribed as data (#1284 Packet 1) from build_review_graph (crates/darkmux-lab/src/lab/review.rs), the Task/Step graph `darkmux pr-review run` builds by hand today: investigate (resolve bundles from the diff, probe every staffed seat, dedup the flags) -> adjudicate (double-confirm judge over the deduped flags) -> report (verify confirmed findings, synthesize tier counts). Authored + validated in Packet 1; NOT YET wired into execution (Packet 3) -- run_review_graph still calls build_review_graph directly.

inputs.name: diff
inputs.description: The unified diff text under review (ReviewStepContext.diff). Fed to every probe/judge/verify dispatch.

inputs.name: case_id
inputs.description: Unique id for this review run (ReviewStepContext.case_id) -- correlates flow records and the review envelope.

inputs.name: intent_title
inputs.description: PR title, gives probes/judges the change's stated intent (ReviewStepContext.intent_title).

inputs.name: crew_staffing
inputs.description: Resolved probe/judge/verify seat staffing (CrewStaffingSnapshot / ResolvedSeatStaffing) from the operator's crew config. Determines HOW MANY review.probe:<seat-name> tasks the investigate phase's probe-template task expands into at launch time -- see the 'review-probe-template' task's notes below. This is the single biggest thing this schema cannot express yet: a config-time repeat-per-staffed-seat primitive does not exist (#1284 Packet 1 finding; Packet 3 must decide how a launcher expands this task).

inputs.name: judge_concurrency
inputs.description: Overrides the judge step's config.concurrency (darkmux_types::config_access::review_judge_concurrency, default 1). Optional -- the static config below ships the same default.

phases.description: resolve review bundles from the diff, probe every staffed seat, dedup

tasks.description: resolve review bundles from the diff

PLACEHOLDER for the probe stage. build_review_graph builds ONE task/step PER STAFFED PROBE SEAT (kind `review.probe:<seat-name>`, ids `review-probe-{idx}-task` / `review-probe-{idx}-step`) -- a count and a set of names only known once `crew_staffing` (see inputs) resolves. This schema has no per-seat repeat primitive yet, so this single task stands in for the whole stage. Packet 3's launcher must expand it into N real tasks (one per staffed seat, each depends_on review-bundle-task) before this config becomes an executable graph.
notes: kind is a TEMPLATE -- the real per-seat kind id is `review.probe:<seat-name>`, registered into a per-run StepKindRegistry at composition time (Tier 3, #1352), not this generic `review.probe`.
after expansion, review-dedup-task's depends_on must list every EXPANDED probe task id, not just this template's id.

tasks.description: dedup probe flags -- mechanism-family keying + anchor matching
double-confirm judge -- internal pass1/pass2 loop over deduped flags

phases.description: verify confirmed findings, synthesize tier counts

notes: always present in the graph even when no verify seat is staffed -- ReviewVerifyStepKind itself no-ops on an absent seat; this config does not (yet) express that conditionality.

tasks.description: synthesis -- finalize tier counts + needs-check clustering
